results.title: Use Snipping Tool to capture screenshots | Microsoft Support
results.snippet: Learn how to use Snipping Tool to capture a screenshot, or snip, of any object on your screen, and then annotate, save, or share the image.

results.snippet: You can use the Snipping Tool or the PRINT SCREEN key. Use the Snipping Tool The Windows Snipping Tool captures all or part of your PC screen. After you capture a snip, it's automatically …

results.title: 使用剪取工具擷取螢幕擷取畫面 | Microsoft Support
results.snippet: 開啟 [剪取工具] 選擇 「開始 」按鈕，輸入 剪切工具，然後從結果中選擇 「剪切工具 」。 你可以使用以下快捷鍵，讓剪 切工具 更快完成任務： 按 Windows 標誌鍵 + Shift + S 即可開啟剪切工具的覆蓋 …

results.title: Usar a Ferramenta de Captura para obter capturas de tela
results.snippet: Saiba como usar a Ferramenta de Snipping para capturar uma captura de tela ou um snip de qualquer objeto em sua tela e anotar, salvar ou compartilhar a imagem.
